apiunto-cache-status-info-label: Label for the cache status row in the Apiunto section on action=info.
apiunto-cache-status-cached: Cache status value shown when the response is currently cached.
apiunto-cache-status-not-cached: Cache status value shown when the response is not currently cached.
apiunto-cache-status-disabled: Cache status value shown when response caching is disabled ($wgApiuntoEnableCache is false).
apiunto-cache-url-info-label: Label for the request URL row in the Apiunto section on action=info.
apiunto-cache-key-info-label: The cache key for the Apiunto Extension
apiunto-cache-time-info-label: The cache time for the Apiunto Extension
apiunto-cache-expires-info-label: The cache expiry for the Apiunto Extension
apiunto-cache-duration-info-label: Label for the configured cache duration row in the Apiunto section on action=info.
apiunto-request-count-info-label: The request count for the Apiunto Extension
